pom.xml.general_idea: Update Spring Boot parent version to 2.6.2 to support Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.4.x does not fully support Java 17; upgrading to 2.6.x is required for compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Set the Java source and target version to 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to JDK 17, so the build configuration must reflect this to compile correctly.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Set the Spring MVC path matching strategy to ANT_PATH_MATCHER to resolve deprecation warnings and prepare for removal of the default PathPatternParser in Spring Boot 3.x.
src/main/resources/application.propertie.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.0 (Java 17+) removes the default PathPatternParser and enforces ANT_PATH_MATCHER or requires explicit configuration; without this, applications relying on Ant-style patterns may fail to start or behave incorrectly due to removed APIs.
